articles.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
articles.description: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

articles.title: SpaceX launches Starship V3 for the first time, but loses booster on return
articles.description: The company had a mostly successful first launch of its upgraded Starship V3, which it needs to power its many ambitious goals in the years to come.

articles.title: Blue Origin cleared to fly New Glenn mega-rocket after April mishap
articles.description: Jeff Bezos' rocket company confirmed an engine failure led to the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite last month, but offered little detail.

articles.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
articles.description: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

articles.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
articles.description: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

articles.title: Kash Patel’s clothing brand website shut down after reports it was hacked
articles.description: According to users on X, the website was hijacked by hackers in an attempt to trick visitors into installing malware.

articles.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
articles.description: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

articles.title: Spotify’s AI bet: more of everything, less of what you want
articles.description: Spotify has released a bunch of AI-powered tools that nudge users to create more content. It can be a bit much.

articles.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
articles.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

articles.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
articles.description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

articles.title: Trump Mobile confirms it exposed customers’ personal data, including phone numbers and home addresses
articles.description: President Trump’s branded cell phone maker and cell provider said the exposure was linked to a third-party platform and was evaluating whether it needs to notify customers.

articles.title: SpaceX files to go public, and the math requires a little faith
articles.description: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone, and the numbers inside match the ambition: a $28 trillion total addressable market, a pay package tied to establishing a Mars colony, and a valuation target that would make it the largest IPO in American […]

articles.title: Meta quietly launches a new Reddit-like app called Forum
articles.description: The company describes the app as a "dedicated space built for deeper discussions, real answers and communities you care about."

articles.title: Smart ring maker Oura files to go public
articles.description: The Finnish company said in September that it has sold 5.5 million smart rings to date.

articles.title: Audio-generation app Huxe, founded by former NotebookLM developers, shuts down
articles.description: Huxe said that it has pulled its app from App Store and Play Store, and that it will stop working later this month.

articles.title: Finnish phone maker HMD bundles Indian AI chatbot onto new smartphone in push to reach local market
articles.description: The partnership is a potential testing ground for both companies to gauge the appetite for an India-focused chatbot.

articles.title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
articles.description: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

articles.title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
articles.description: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.

articles.title: Who will benefit most from SpaceX IPO? Mostly Elon — and a few from his inner circle
articles.description: Elon Musk has the largest stake in SpaceX by billions of shares. The other biggest shareholders also have longstanding and deep ties to Musk.

articles.title: Waymo halts freeway rides after robotaxis struggle in construction zones
articles.description: The service suspension comes as Waymo has also paused operations in Atlanta and San Antonio after its robotaxis drove into flooded streets.

articles.title: First-generation Chromecast users stressed by devices suddenly failing
articles.description: Google tells Ars it fixed the first-gen Chromecast bug.

articles.title: Trump FCC asks public to comment on whether ABC's The View is a news show
articles.description: FCC seeks opinions on whether ABC show's decisions are "based on newsworthiness."

articles.title: US scrambles to stop Internet users re-creating dead pilots’ voices
articles.description: Workaround flouts law that bans NTSB disclosures of cockpit audio recordings.

articles.title: The Boys is dead. Long live Vought Rising.
articles.description: "There's a brighter future. All we need to do is take it."

articles.title: Police boast of hacking VPN where criminals "believed themselves to be safe"
articles.description: Law enforcement intercepted VPN traffic, seized domains, and arrested its operator.

articles.title: Review: The Mandalorian and Grogu is ... fine
articles.description: The plot is predictable, the fight scenes are meh, but you can't beat the charm of that little green Grogu.

articles.title: Texas AG sues Meta over claims that WhatsApp doesn't provide end-to-end encryption
articles.description: Critics note a lack of factual support in lawsuit filed by US Senate candidate.

articles.title: Before it comes down, what should be saved from the International Space Station?
articles.description: What went up cannot all come down (for museum display).

articles.title: Marketer that claimed it could tap devices for ad targeting will pay $880K settlement
articles.description: Two additional marketing companies will also pay $25,000 each.

articles.title: Soaring solar and a surge in hydro push more coal off the US grid

articles.description: Keep the charging puck’s exposed pins far away from anything metal.

articles.title: NASA undertakes major reorganization to reduce bureaucracy and move faster

articles.title: A hacker group is poisoning open source code at an unprecedented scale
articles.description: GitHub is just the latest victim of TeamPCP, a gang that has carried out a spree of software supply chain attacks.

articles.title: Ground system issue scrubs first launch of SpaceX's Starship V3 rocket
articles.description: Engineers could make another attempt to launch Starship as soon as Friday evening.

articles.title: IoT gadget maker AcuRite shares reasoning for killing customers’ favorite app
articles.description: "The move to AcuRite NOW has not been as smooth as some customers expected..."

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI技术应用**：AI被用于复活已故飞行员的语音，引发技术与伦理讨论。
2. **航天进展**：SpaceX首次发射星舰V3但回收失败，蓝色起源获准在4月事故后重新发射新格伦火箭。
3. **企业上市动态**：SpaceX与智能戒指公司Oura均提交上市申请，引发市场关注。
4. **平台与法规争议**：苹果坚持Epic诉讼不应改变App Store规则；Meta低调推出类Reddit应用“Forum”。
5. **数据安全与隐私**：特朗普移动公司确认用户数据泄露，包括电话号码和家庭地址。

今日最值得关注的发展是SpaceX与Oura相继申请上市，标志商业航天与可穿戴健康设备领域进入资本市场新阶段。

articles.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
articles.description: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm. At its annual I/O developer conference , Google announced a sweeping redesign of the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. The c

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **AI模型专业化与效率突破**：Hugging Face发布多项技术进展，包括强调专业化优于规模的AI采购策略、更高效的地球观测模型OlmoEarth v1.1、新型Ettin Reranker排序模型，以及基于LoRA/DoRA微调的机器人视频生成技术。
2. **文档处理与智能体技术更新**：PaddleOCR 3.5引入Transformers后端支持OCR与文档解析；同时推出开放智能体排行榜，推动AI自主系统评估。
3. **Google I/O 2026聚焦智能体与搜索变革**：宣布进入“智能体Gemini时代”，发布Gemini 3.5（具备行动能力的边界智能），并推出AI模式改变美国用户搜索方式、Google Workspace新增创作与效率功能，以及Google Beam会议优化实验。
4. **社区与生态投资**：Google宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资，并汇总了I/O 2026期间公布的100项创新成果。

**今日最值得关注**：Google I/O 2026正式宣告“智能体Gemini时代”到来，Gemini 3.5的发布标志着AI从被动响应向主动行动的范式转变。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国AI战略与产业主导地位**：多篇报道聚焦中国开放型AI战略如何强化工业主导权，包括AI实验室、机器人初创企业和学术界的实地观察，以及中国对“代理式AI”的命名、定义与监管启动。
2. **中美科技竞争与芯片博弈**：英伟达承认在AI芯片市场“基本让位”给华为；美国云服务被中国租用的计算资源规模引发关注；特朗普与习近平峰会后中美各自公告的对比分析。
3. **中国AI发展现状与争议**：有分析指出中国AI乐观情绪并非表面所见；WiseTech公司因AI裁员在中国员工中引发指控与劳资冲突；中国将2000台服务器沉入海底以满足AI电力需求。
4. **中国对外投资与科技合作**：中国超越美国成为德国最大外国投资者；欧中联合发射航天器研究地球“隐形护盾”；特斯拉宣布在中国全面推广全自动驾驶技术。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国正通过开放AI战略、芯片自主化（英伟达退让华为）及前沿技术布局（海底服务器、代理式AI监管），在多维度加速构建全球科技竞争新格局。
